title: Change record
description: One line of a changes/{deviceId}.jsonl log: a single version of one record.

entity.description: Entities split out of `application` because LWW resolves whole records, so an unrelated edit on one device would clobber them: `application_event` (append-only, immutable — one post-apply outcome transition, id '{application_id}:{occurred_at}:{to_outcome}') and `application_schedule` (mutable reminder dates, keyed by application id). Same reasoning that split `triage` out of `job`.

updated_at.description: RFC3339 UTC, millisecond precision. The LWW clock.

data.description: Record payload. Absent/ignored when deleted=true. Unknown keys must be preserved verbatim.
